theorem P2_implies_P1 {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] {A : Set X}
    (h : Topology.P2 A) : Topology.P1 A := by
  unfold Topology.P1 Topology.P2 at h ⊢
  exact subset_trans h interior_subset

theorem P2_imp_P1 {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] {A : Set X}
    (h : Topology.P2 A) : Topology.P1 A := by
  intro x hx
  have hx_int : x ∈ interior (closure (interior A)) := h hx
  have hsubset : interior (closure (interior A)) ⊆ closure (interior A) :=
    Set.interior_subset
  exact hsubset hx_int

theorem P2_imp_P1
    {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] {A : Set X} :
    Topology.P2 A → Topology.P1 A := by
  intro hP2
  exact
    Set.Subset.trans hP2
      (interior_subset :
        interior (closure (interior A)) ⊆ closure (interior A))
